name: RAJAT SAGAR MEHTA
meta: Eligibility: Authorized to work in Canada (Permanent Resident)

bullets: Designed and developed RESTful APIs for a CRM software in an Agile environment using Spring Boot, enabling faster feature delivery for enterprise clients.
Migrated infrastructure to AWS and introduced serverless Lambda functions, improving scalability and reducing downtime by 20%.
Mentored an intern by reviewing code, setting up CI/CD pipelines, and promoting API design best practices, improving overall team delivery speed.
Collaborated with a global team in a virtual environment to build CRM solutions for telecom clients using Java and Spring Boot.
Designed and implemented 10+ RESTful APIs to manage offer data (e.g., mobile add-ons, BYOD plans), serving thousands of daily users.
Optimized backend performance by eliminating redundant service calls, achieving a 20% increase in application throughput.
Delivered real-time production support by troubleshooting API failures and database bottlenecks, ensuring 99.9% uptime for client systems.
Integrated Razorpay payment gateway into web applications, enabling secure and seamless online transactions.
Developed and maintained backend services using Java and REST APIs, managing data persistence with MongoDB.
Collaborated with senior engineers on full-stack projects, gaining hands-on experience in end-to-end product delivery.

education.program: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) in Computer Science
